item.description:
Associate Cyber Security Analyst

  • Monitor and triage security alerts within the SOC L1 team, analyzing network traffic across EDR, XDR, BEAMSEC, ESA, and SIEM platforms

  • Detect and classify threats including phishing, malware, and brute-force/unauthorized access attempts

  • Contribute to the refinement of detection rules and triage procedures

Cyber Security - Intern

  • Monitored and analyzed security events using QRadar SIEM and Trend Micro Vision One (XDR), supporting network security operations

  • Conducted vulnerability assessments and threat analysis across both offensive (red team) and defensive (blue team) exercises

  • Contributed to identifying and reporting security gaps within the organization’s network infrastructure

Network Management - Intern

  • Analyzed and evaluated security architectures within Turkish Airlines’ corporate network infrastructure

  • Contributed to Proof of Concept (PoC) studies for the protection of critical systems

  • Detected, classified, and reported security incidents through SIEM solutions
